transcript.text: Hello. Here I am in Prague. I stayed at the Old Prague Hostel. It's right in the center of town. There's tons of hostels in the center of town. It was 450 kroners. I think that's like 18 euro. Even on the website it was like 13 euro. But anyways.

But this hostel is cool. Check it out. This is the central lounge area where I'm hanging out all by myself. Because I'm uploading videos and it's taking forever. But they had a bunch of cereal for breakfast. They still have orange juice out there. You know, refrigerator, microwave. In that TV we saw a movie, The Big Lebowski, they have all these movies you can check and play and also videos and music and stuff. Which is the first time I've seen that.
Got a dorm room there and a dorm room there. It's cool, man. At least that I can hang out here and upload videos even after I checked out. So, cool place. Old Prague Hostel.
Look at that. What the little kids do. This must not be the marathon. This must be like the Prague 6 miler or something. Little kids like that can't run marathons.
The bronze medal and flowers are given by Panagiotis Dímakos, General Secretary of SEJAS.
Medaily a květiny za 2. místo předává Pan Rudolf Javurek, generální ředitel společnosti Import of Magic Group.
Silver medal and flowers are given by Mr. Rudolf Javurek, the General Director of Import of Magic Group.
The Czech Republic. Check out. It's the marathon. It's about to rain too. It was so sunny this morning. I thought it was gonna be perfect.
It's the oldest bridge in Prague. The guy who took me to the center told me that. I said, I said bike around it. And they got a nice shirt.
